text.title: Quarterly Retainer Review Script Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Scale-up decision-record
example.note: {client:Acme, quarter:Q2-2026, decision:scale_up, scope_delta:{hours_bought_per_month_from:40, hours_bought_per_month_to:60, new_deliverables:['weekly content audit','monthly SEO report'], sla_target_response_hours:4}, effective_date:2026-07-01, next_review_date:2026-10-15, client_decision_maker:'M. Chen (CMO)', agency_lead:'yourname', follow_up_email_sent_at:2026-04-16T18:00:00Z, call_duration_minutes:43}
